0.q: RcLOG7-1 modulated the expression of genes involved in glutathione metabolism...thereby enhancing antioxidant enzyme activity and lignin content in transgenic Arabidopsis.

2.q: RcLOG7-1 influenced plant hormone signal transduction, particularly cytokinin synthesis (CTK), leading to elevated CTK levels in transgenic Arabidopsis compared to wild type.

3.q: overexpression of RcLOG7-1 in transgenic Arabidopsis thaliana significantly increased cytokinin (CTK) accumulation

4.q: RcLOG7-1 enhances transgenic Arabidopsis tolerance to drought and salt stresses by modulating reactive oxygen species (ROS) accumulation... improved scavenging of active oxygen free radicals

5.q: The activation of CTK biosynthesis depends on enzymatic catalysis by LONELY GUY (LOG) proteins... converted into the active form by LOG enzymes
